findings.description: tasks.md:58 (Task 4.2) and spec.md:113 (R4) depend on coordination_bridge.try_emit_audit_event(), which does not exist in the codebase, nor does the agent-coordinator HTTP API expose a POST /audit/log endpoint for custom events.
findings.resolution: Add a task to Phase 0 to implement try_emit_audit_event() in coordination_bridge.py and a corresponding POST /audit/log endpoint in agent-coordinator/src/coordination_api.py.

findings.description: tasks.md:25 (Phase 1.2) migrates review_dispatcher.py to the new manifest format, but the dispatcher lacks a change_id parameter required by contracts/review-cache-layout.schema.json.
findings.resolution: Add a task to Phase 1 to add a --change-id argument to review_dispatcher.py CLI and pass it to checkpoint_findings.write_manifest().

findings.description: spec.md:90 (R3) and design.md:243 define ConvergenceResult.synthesis_failed=True, but this field is unreachable in converge() because the synthesis exception is re-raised before the result can be returned.
findings.resolution: Modify converge() to attach the partial ConvergenceResult to the raised exception, or return a (result, exception) tuple, or document that callers must reconstruct the result themselves from the exception context.

findings.description: contracts/review-cache-layout.schema.json:81 and contracts/README.md:11 contain stale references to 'fallback CLI' and 'fallback_recovered/failed' events which were dropped in this revision.
findings.resolution: Update the manifest description and README table to reflect the new 'durable checkpoint for manual recovery' framing and the updated event name.

findings.description: finding.schema.json requires review_type, target, and reviewer_vendor in per-vendor files, but existing ReviewOrchestrator does not inject these into ReviewResult.findings, risking contract violations if the helper doesn't handle wrapping.
findings.resolution: Explicitly specify in the checkpoint_findings.write_vendor_findings() task (Phase 0.2) that the helper is responsible for injecting these required fields into the wrapper object before writing.
